title: Implement secretx-scaleway-sm backend
description: Implement the Scaleway Secret Manager backend. Stub README exists at secretx-scaleway-sm/README.md. URI: secretx:scaleway-sm:<project-id>/<secret-name>. Auth via SCW_SECRET_KEY (plus SCW_DEFAULT_PROJECT_ID and SCW_DEFAULT_REGION as defaults). API: api.scaleway.com/secret-manager/v1beta1. Supports revision pinning via ?revision=<n>. Implements SecretStore and WritableSecretStore.
